Local winter hike with the GMC

Up and down White Rock Mountain with a group

  • Written: Dec 23, 2025
  • Date hiked: Jan 19, 2018
  • Distance: 4.8 miles
  • Town: Stowe
  • State: Vermont

The wind was blistery up this one. Twas my first one joining up with the Green Mountain Club. it as nice not having to plan or lead.

  • trip-report
  • Vermont
  • Stowe
